rationale: Keep: the cited paper is methodologically central to the citing paper’s domain (finite-mixture vs HB logit treatment of heterogeneity in choice models), not a generic background citation. The citing note explicitly says it “extends prior mixture-of-scale discrete-choice modeling,” and the 2002 JMKR article is a key empirical comparison in exactly that modeling space, so this pair is plausibly foundational/method-source.
